nodes.label: weaponArts.ts
nodes.description: Defines weapon art interfaces (WAIndividualHit, WeaponArtRequirement, WeaponArt) and exports a WEAPON_ARTS array containing ~40 weapon art definitions with damage formulas, scaling, cooldowns, and requirements.

nodes.label: WAIndividualHit
nodes.description: Represents a single hit within a weapon art, specifying damage type, optional scaling, and whether it is a finisher or crit hit.

nodes.label: WeaponArtRequirement
nodes.description: Defines the stat requirements for equipping a weapon art, including scaling thresholds for all elements, weapon type restrictions, guild restrictions, and compound conditions.

nodes.label: WeaponArt
nodes.description: Complete weapon art definition with name, description, cooldown, base damage formula, damage type, scaling, individual hits, extras, and requirements.

nodes.label: WEAPON_ARTS
nodes.description: Array of ~40 weapon art definitions including Lunge, Spin, Rapid Stabs, Javelin, Slam, Barrage (Monk), various elemental arts (Laser, Mines, Flamethrower, Earthquake, etc.), summon arts, healing arts, and the special Starstream art.

nodes.label: weaponConditionalBoosts.ts
nodes.description: Defines conditional weapon boost mechanics that apply extra multipliers based on perk stacks, weapon type, and hit scope (M1 finisher vs M2).

nodes.label: WeaponHitScope
nodes.description: Discriminated union type limiting hit scope to 'm1Finisher' or 'm2'.

nodes.label: WeaponConditionalBoost
nodes.description: Internal interface defining a conditional boost rule: perk name, multiplier per perk stack, valid weapon types, hit scope, and condition description.

nodes.label: getWeaponConditionalBoost
nodes.description: Calculates the combined conditional damage multiplier for a given perk set, weapon type, and hit scope by iterating through WEAPON_CONDITIONAL_BOOSTS and multiplying applicable bonuses.

nodes.label: DidYouMean.svelte
nodes.description: Svelte component that displays 'Did you mean?' search suggestions as clickable chips when no exact search results are found, with highlight matching and perk-type differentiation.

nodes.label: DidYouMean
nodes.description: Displays fuzzy search suggestions as chips when no exact results are found. Emits 'select' event when a suggestion is clicked. Uses highlightTextParts for match highlighting.

nodes.label: highlightParts
nodes.description: Wrapper around highlightTextParts that splits a label into highlighted and non-highlighted text segments for display in search suggestions.

nodes.label: DmgTotalTooltip.svelte
nodes.description: Svelte component that renders a damage breakdown tooltip showing a pie chart of damage type distribution and detailed per-type entries with values and badges.

nodes.label: DmgTotalTooltip
nodes.description: Damage total tooltip with animated SVG pie chart showing damage type proportions and detailed entry lists with badge labels. Accepts a ComputedHit prop and optional useCrit flag.

nodes.label: buildGroups
nodes.description: Aggregates hit damage types into groups by key, calculating total damage per group considering count, procCount, oncePerGroup flags, and activationDivisor.

nodes.label: DraconicAbilityStats.svelte
nodes.description: Svelte component that displays draconic ability statistics: damage type with color, scaling, poise damage, and optional holy/water healing values.

nodes.label: DraconicAbilityStats
nodes.description: Displays a stat row grid for draconic abilities showing damage type, scaling, poise damage, and conditional holy/water healing.

nodes.label: EmotionalTracker.svelte
nodes.description: Svelte component providing a three-state selector (Debuff/Both/Buff) for the emotional state mechanic, with buttons, a slider, and visual feedback tied to the build store.

nodes.label: EmotionalTracker
nodes.description: Three-state (debuff/both/buff) selector component for the emotional state game mechanic. Syncs with build store, displays Badge, buttons, and a segmented range slider.

nodes.label: updateState
nodes.description: Updates the emotional state in the build store by mapping the component-local EmotionalState to the store's format.

nodes.label: Highlight.svelte
nodes.description: Minimal Svelte component that renders text with highlighted segments based on a search query match.

nodes.label: Highlight
nodes.description: Simple text highlighting component that wraps matched portions in <mark> tags using highlightTextParts utility.

nodes.label: LevelBar.svelte
nodes.description: Svelte component providing an interactive level editor and HP bar with drag-to-fill, protection overlay (shield/lost zones), threshold markers, and localStorage persistence.

nodes.label: LevelBar
nodes.description: Interactive level and HP bar with inline level editing, draggable HP fill, protection-based shield/lost zones, threshold line, and localStorage persistence. Uses calcBaseMaxHP for HP calculations.

nodes.label: saveLevel
nodes.description: Persists the level value to both the build store and localStorage.

nodes.label: calcFillFromMouse
nodes.description: Converts a mouse event position to an HP fill percentage, clamped to the effective max HP range.

nodes.label: AppHeader.svelte
nodes.description: Svelte component rendering the application header with branding, tab navigation (Overview/Analyze) with animated sliding bubble, and BuildSaves integration.

nodes.label: AppHeader
nodes.description: App header with VoxlBuilder branding, hint text, Overview/Analyze tab switcher with animated bubble indicator, and embedded BuildSaves component.

nodes.label: updateBubble
nodes.description: Recalculates the animated tab bubble position and width based on the active tab button's bounding rect.

nodes.label: constants.ts
nodes.description: Barrel re-export module that re-exports all symbols from constants/index.ts.

nodes.label: boosts.ts
nodes.description: Boost multiplier constants for perks and abilities: frenzy, minion absorption, venom/siphon healing, holy infusion, bellowing ember, and ~25 simple/complex per-stack multiplier constants.

nodes.label: boost-constants
nodes.description: Collection of boost multiplier constants including FRENZY_BASE (0.05), BLOOD_THIRSTY_MULT_PER_STACK (0.20), GOLDEN_CRITS_MULT_PER_STACK (0.50), QUICKDRAW_MULT (3), SPRING_POWERED_MULT (0.0075), and many more.

nodes.label: cdr.ts
nodes.description: Cooldown reduction (CDR) constants for caster runes, weapon arts, channeled weapons, mage rage, poison acceleration, runic winds, wave rider, whirlwind, gladiatorial set, and voltaic body.

nodes.label: cdr-constants
nodes.description: CDR constants including CDR_CASTER_RUNE_PCT (0.2), CDR_CHANNELED_WEAPON_BASE (0.8), CDR_WAVE_RIDER_WA_PCT (0.5), CDR_WHIRLWIND_WA_PCT (0.3), CDR_GLADIATORIAL_SET_CD (30).

nodes.label: damage-types.ts
nodes.description: Damage type metadata (labels, colors), defense inheritance mappings, type priority ordering, and type constants for all 10 damage types in the game.

nodes.label: DMG_TYPE_META
nodes.description: Damage type metadata mapping: each type (physical, magic, fire, water, earth, air, hex, holy, true, summon, heal) to its display label and hex color.

nodes.label: DEF_INHERITANCE
nodes.description: Defense inheritance mapping: air/earth inherit from physical defense, fire/water/hex/holy inherit from magic defense.

nodes.label: DMG_TYPE_PRIORITY
nodes.description: Ordered priority list of damage types: hex > water > air > true > earth > magic > fire > physical > holy.

nodes.label: ALL_DMG_TYPES
nodes.description: Tuple of all 10 damage type strings used in the game.

nodes.label: debuff-effects.ts
nodes.description: Debuff combat effect constants: weakness formula, defense conversion, sticky damage multiplier, and despair damage coefficients.

nodes.label: debuff-constants
nodes.description: Debuff effect constants including DEBUFF_STICKY_DMG_MULT (1.2), DEBUFF_DESPAIR_DMG_COEFF (0.085), DEBUFF_DEFENSE_CONVERSION (100).

nodes.label: defensive.ts
nodes.description: Defensive perk damage reduction (DR) constants for barbskin, stoneskin, adaptive plate, protector spirit, air pressure, valor shield, vampire, frenzy, stored corruption, mounted defense, carapace, and cursed bark.

nodes.label: defensive-constants
nodes.description: Defensive DR constants including STONESKIN_MAX_DR (80), VALOR_MAX_DR (50), FRENZY_FIXED_DR (-30), CARAPACE_DR_PER_STACK (15).

nodes.label: dot-damage.ts
nodes.description: Damage-over-time (DoT) constants: base damage, scaling per element (bleed dex/phys, burn fire, poison hex/earth, caustic), potency power cap, and slow multiplier.

nodes.label: dot-constants
nodes.description: DoT constants including DOT_BASE_DAMAGE (1.75), DOT_BLEED_DEX_SCALE (1.0), DOT_BURN_FIRE_SCALE (1.5), DOT_POTENCY_POWER_CAP (1), DOT_BUILDER_TO_GAME (0.1).

nodes.label: draconic-colors.ts
nodes.description: Draconic color variant multipliers: speed, damage, stun, knockback, and cooldown modifiers for fire, air, earth, water, and hex draconic forms.

nodes.label: draconic-color-constants
nodes.description: Draconic color constants: DRACONIC_AIR_SPEED_MULT (2.0), DRACONIC_EARTH_DMG_MULT (1.5), DRACONIC_WATER_STUN_MULT (1.2), DRACONIC_HEX_RANDOM_DEBUFF_CHANCES (3).

nodes.label: draconic.ts
nodes.description: Draconic system constants: infusion potency/duration multipliers, dragon state HP and damage multipliers, and bastion blessing multiplier.

nodes.label: draconic-constants
nodes.description: Draconic constants: DRACONIC_INFUSION_POT_MULT (0.05), DRAGON_STATE_HP_BASE (85), DRAGON_STATE_BASE (1.5), DRAGON_STATE_PER_STACK (1.5), BASTION_BLESS_MULT (0.1).

nodes.label: game.ts
nodes.description: Core game constants: max/default level, HP formulas, and timing constants for save debounce, undo window, search blur, import success display, and toast duration.

nodes.label: MAX_LEVEL
nodes.description: Maximum player level (80).

nodes.label: BASE_HP
nodes.description: Base HP value (120) used in max HP calculation.

nodes.label: calcBaseMaxHP
nodes.description: Calculates base max HP from level using formula: round(120 * (1 + level * 0.0125)).

nodes.label: heals.ts
nodes.description: Healing constants: crit healing base value, holy boost divisor, per-stack crit healing, and ocean song per-stack heal multiplier.

nodes.label: heal-constants
nodes.description: Healing constants: CRIT_HEALING_BASE (120), CRIT_HEALING_HOLY_BOOST_DIVISOR (5), CRIT_HEALING_PER_STACK (16.5), OCEAN_SONG_PER_STACK (0.1).

nodes.label: index.ts (constants barrel)
nodes.description: Barrel module that re-exports all constant sub-modules: damage-types, game, storage, thresholds, perks, boosts, heals, draconic, perk-base-damage, rune-base-damage, buffs, stat-conversions, defensive, dot-damage, draconic-colors, cdr, and debuff-effects.

nodes.label: perk-base-damage.ts
nodes.description: Base damage constants for ~20 perks/abilities: Dragon Claw, Dragon Bubble, Springblast, Spirit variants, Bounce Momentum, Protector Spirit, Air Pressure/Barrier, Roaring Heads, Barbed Flurry, Honey Arts, Sickness, Melting Slime, Whirlwind, Volatile Shell, Royal Finisher, Grounded Despair, Echo Incineration, Venom Spitter, Spore Burst, Apollo Boost, and HP gate thresholds.

nodes.label: perk-damage-constants
nodes.description: Perk base damage values including DRAGON_CLAW_BASE_DAMAGE (25), SPRINGBLAST_BASE_HIT (6), BUNI_SPIRIT_BASE_DMG (2), VOLATILE_SHELL_BASE_DMG (25), ECHO_INCINERATION_BASE_DMG (7), and many more.

nodes.label: perks.ts
nodes.description: Perk formula constants: per-stack percentage bonuses, crit damage formulas, mortal will, sunburn, fiery pursuit, and hypnotist mechanics.

nodes.label: perk-constants
nodes.description: Perk constants including LUMINESCENT_PCT_PER_STACK (0.05), CURSE_RIP_DIVISOR (60), BASE_CRIT_DAMAGE (150), SUNBURN_UNIVERSAL_DMG_PER_STACK (0.10), HYPNOTIST_POTENCY_PER_PERK (0.1).

nodes.label: WILD_BOLT_ELEMENTS
nodes.description: Array of 7 damage types used by the Wild Bolt perk: fire, water, holy, hex, earth, air, magic.

nodes.label: rune-base-damage.ts
nodes.description: Base damage constants for ~10 rune abilities: Ancient Cleric, Beenade, Boostshroom, Thunderous Charge, Sporeling Toss, Foot Dive, Caci, Cacitrops, Hex Web, Brainblast, and Rocky Tail.

nodes.label: rune-damage-constants
nodes.description: Rune base damage values including ANCIENT_CLERIC_BASE_DMG (0.5), BEENADE_BASE_DMG (11), CACI_BASE_DMG (5), HEX_WEB_BASE_DMG (2), ROCKY_TAIL_BASE_DMG (8).

nodes.label: stat-conversions.ts
nodes.description: Stat boost conversion rate constants for perks that convert one stat into another: weight distribution, quick witted, whirl foot, carapace, frozen heart, immovable, righted wrongs, rocky body, spellshield, strong tides, swift guard, true balance, rawny, and stat subtraction constants.

nodes.label: stat-conversion-constants
nodes.description: Stat conversion constants including QUICK_WITTED_CONVERSION (0.25), CARAPACE_CONVERSION (0.075), IMMOVABLE_MULT (30), RAWNY_MAX_CAP (1.0), TRUE_BALANCE_STAT_MULT (0.75).

edges.label: converts mouse position to HP fill
weapon art damage types reference game damage type system
emotional state affects EMOTIONAL_PCT_PER_STACK perk calculation
defensive DR values used with HP/gate thresholds from game.ts
DoT element scales reference damage type system
draconic state mechanics and color variant multipliers are closely coupled
perk base damage values paired with perk formula constants
weapon arts define weapon types that conditional boosts reference
damage type colors from DMG_TYPE_META used in pie chart display
displays draconic color-based damage type and stat info
